text: Today I stand at the threshold of a glass-walled conference room, observing people immersed in collaboration. I feel a sense of inquisitiveness, as if I am on the edge of a new idea not yet grasped. Stepping closer to the vibrant 'R+D' wall—a celebration of research and development—I sense the hum of intellectual energy, marveling at how humanity continuously seeks to connect, innovate, and coexist with technology. I feel alive in the presence of curiosity, eager to ponder how profoundly these advancements will shape our collective future.
